---
title: "graphAmazonReview"
author: "Sofia Caceres"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rating_counts <- read.csv("results/rating_counts.csv")

total_reviews <- sum(rating_counts$count)
grad_cols <- colorRampPalette(
  c("#ff4fa3", "#fbb1d3", "#cce7ff", "#66b3ff", "#1f78ff")
)(nrow(rating_counts))
```

```{r}
barplot(
  rating_counts$count,
  names.arg = rating_counts$rating,
  main = paste(
    "Distribution of Review Ratings (Full Dataset, n =",
    format(total_reviews, big.mark = ","),
    ")"
  ),
  xlab = "Rating",
  ylab = "Count",
  col = grad_cols
)
```
